name: Cheesecake Ala Linda-Bah-Linda
recipeInstructions:
FILLING:
- 4 cups Philadelphia cream cheese, softened
- 2 cups sour cream, at room temperature
- 6 large eggs, at room temperature
- 2 cups granulated sugar
- 1 tablespoon vanilla extract
- ½ teaspoon cinnamon (optional)
CRUST:
- 1 ⅓ cups vanilla wafers, crushed
- ¼ cup granulated sugar
- ½ cup butter, melted
Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine the crust ingredients and press into the bottom of a greased 10-inch springform pan. Mix the filling ingredients and beat until well mixed, but do not overbeat. Pour the filling mixture into the pan. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
(Note: The original recipe had no attribution or metadata.)
